repoURL.description: The URL of the GitHub repository.

targetBranch.description: The branch whose ref will be updated to point to the final signed commit.

head.description: The inclusive head of the revision range (commit SHA). All revisions in the range base..head will be replayed as GitHub-signed commits. Typically set from a prior git-push step's output, e.g. ${{ outputs.push.commit }}.

base.description: The exclusive base of the revision range (commit SHA). Typically set from a prior git-clone step's output, e.g. ${{ outputs.clone.commits.main }}.

insecureSkipTLSVerify.description: Indicates whether to skip TLS verification when communicating with the GitHub API. Default is false.
